401.name: Mom20+WILR14+Top5 w60 (cc3_402.py)
401.description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator that scores three signals on QQQ — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a short-term price momentum check, and a Williams %R reading — to assign one of three risk levels. When all signals align, it holds leveraged tech; partial agreement shifts into the top large-cap stocks; full disagreement mixes stocks and cash.
401.overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend gate and WILR) plus a rate-of-change momentum check. The WILR threshold at -50 (midline) and the 200-day median-price regime filter are slightly unconventional. The mid-state blends (60/40 TQQQ/TopN) and BIL half-allocation at n=0 are tuned parameters.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Williams %R(14) on QQQ > -50

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 (all signals bullish) → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 60% TQQQ + 40% Top-5 large-caps equally; Score 1 → 100% Top-5 large-caps; Score 0 → 50% Top-5 + 50% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + Williams %R. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

402.name: Mom20+ADX14+Top5 w70 (cc3_403.py)
402.description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator using three QQQ signals — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 20-day price momentum check, and ADX directional-index comparison — to select one of three risk levels. Full bullish agreement goes to leveraged tech; mixed signals rotate into large-cap stocks or a blend; all bearish moves to half cash.
402.overfit_notes: Two standard components (ADX and price-median trend). ADX criterion uses DI+ > DI- (directional cross, not a threshold level) which is a standard but mid-sensitivity signal. Mid-state weight at 70/30 (TQQQ/TopN) is more tuned than the w60 variant.

Full bullish agreement goes to leveraged tech; partial agreement mixes leveraged tech with large-cap stocks or holds stocks alone; full bearish splits between stocks and cash.
439.overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend gate and Stochastic oscillator) plus a 60-day momentum lookback. The Stochastic period of 30 bars is a selected parameter; the %K > 50 midline threshold is canonical. The four-state allocation ladder (100% / 50-50 TQQQ+TopN / 100% TopN / 50-50 TopN+BIL) involves multiple tuned breakpoints.
